Sucker Punch.description: This move enables the user to attack first. It fails if the foe is not readying an attack, however.

Toxic Spikes.name: Toxic Spikes
Toxic Spikes.description: The user lays a trap of poison spikes at the foe’s feet. They poison foes that switch into battle.

Heart Swap.name: Heart Swap
Heart Swap.description: The user employs its psychic power to switch stat changes with the foe.

Aqua Ring.name: Aqua Ring
Aqua Ring.description: The user envelops itself in a veil made of water. It regains some HP on every turn.

Magnet Rise.name: Magnet Rise
Magnet Rise.description: The user levitates using electrically generated magnetism for five turns.

Flare Blitz.name: Flare Blitz
Flare Blitz.description: The user cloaks itself in fire and charges at the foe. The user sustains serious damage, too.

Force Palm.name: Force Palm
Force Palm.description: The foe is attacked with a shock wave. It may also leave the target paralyzed.

Aura Sphere.name: Aura Sphere
Aura Sphere.description: The user looses a blast of aura power from deep within its body. This move is certain to hit.

Rock Polish.name: Rock Polish
Rock Polish.description: The user polishes its body to reduce drag. It can sharply raise the Speed stat.

Poison Jab.name: Poison Jab
Poison Jab.description: The foe is stabbed with a tentacle or arm steeped in poison. It may also poison the foe.

Dark Pulse.name: Dark Pulse
Dark Pulse.description: The user releases a horrible aura imbued with dark thoughts. It may also make the target flinch.

Night Slash.name: Night Slash
Night Slash.description: The user slashes the foe the instant an opportunity arises. It has a high critical-hit ratio.

Aqua Tail.name: Aqua Tail
Aqua Tail.description: The user attacks by swinging its tail as if it were a vicious wave in a raging storm.

Seed Bomb.name: Seed Bomb
Seed Bomb.description: The user slams a barrage of hard- shelled seeds down on the foe from above.

Air Slash.name: Air Slash
Air Slash.description: The user attacks with a blade of air that slices even the sky. It may also make the target flinch.

X Scissor.name: X Scissor
X Scissor.description: The user slashes at the foe by crossing its scythes or claws as if they were a pair of scissors.

Bug Buzz.name: Bug Buzz
Bug Buzz.description: The user vibrates its wings to generate a damaging sound wave. It may also lower the foe’s Sp. Def stat.

Dragon Pulse.name: Dragon Pulse
Dragon Pulse.description: The foe is attacked with a shock wave generated by the user’s gaping mouth.

Dragon Rush.name: Dragon Rush
Dragon Rush.description: The user tackles the foe while exhibiting overwhelming menace. It may also make the target flinch.

Power Gem.name: Power Gem
Power Gem.description: The user attacks with a ray of light that sparkles as if it were made of gemstones.

Drain Punch.name: Drain Punch
Drain Punch.description: An energy-draining punch. The user’s HP is restored by half the damage taken by the target.

Vacuum Wave.name: Vacuum Wave
Vacuum Wave.description: The user whirls its fists to send a wave of pure vacuum at the foe. This move always goes first.

Focus Blast.name: Focus Blast
Focus Blast.description: The user heightens its mental focus and unleashes its power. It may also lower the target’s Sp. Def.

Energy Ball.name: Energy Ball
Energy Ball.description: The user draws power from nature and fires it at the foe. It may also lower the target’s Sp. Def.

Brave Bird.name: Brave Bird
Brave Bird.description: The user tucks in its wings and charges from a low altitude. The user also takes serious damage.

Earth Power.name: Earth Power
Earth Power.description: The user makes the ground under the foe erupt with power. It may also lower the target’s Sp. Def.

Switcheroo.name: Switcheroo
Switcheroo.description: The user trades held items with the foe faster than the eye can follow.

Giga Impact.name: Giga Impact
Giga Impact.description: The user charges at the foe using every bit of its power. The user must rest on the next turn.

Nasty Plot.name: Nasty Plot
Nasty Plot.description: The user stimulates its brain by thinking bad thoughts. It sharply raises the user’s Sp. Atk.

Bullet Punch.name: Bullet Punch
Bullet Punch.description: The user strikes with a tough punch as fast as a bullet. This move always goes first.

Avalanche.name: Avalanche
Avalanche.description: An attack move that inflicts double the damage if the user has been hurt by the foe in the same turn.

Ice Shard.name: Ice Shard
Ice Shard.description: The user flash freezes chunks of ice and hurls them. This move always goes first.

Shadow Claw.name: Shadow Claw
Shadow Claw.description: The user slashes with a sharp claw made from shadows. It has a high critical-hit ratio.

Thunder Fang.name: Thunder Fang
Thunder Fang.description: The user bites with electrified fangs. It may also make the foe flinch or become paralyzed.

Ice Fang.name: Ice Fang
Ice Fang.description: The user bites with cold-infused fangs. It may also make the foe flinch or freeze.

Fire Fang.name: Fire Fang
Fire Fang.description: The user bites with flame-cloaked fangs. It may also make the foe flinch or sustain a burn.

Shadow Sneak.name: Shadow Sneak
Shadow Sneak.description: The user extends its shadow and attacks the foe from behind. This move always goes first.

Mud Bomb.name: Mud Bomb
Mud Bomb.description: The user launches a hard-packed mud ball to attack. It may also lower the target’s accuracy.

Psycho Cut.name: Psycho Cut
Psycho Cut.description: The user tears at the foe with blades formed by psychic power. It has a high critical-hit ratio.

Zen Headbutt.name: Zen Headbutt
Zen Headbutt.description: The user focuses its willpower to its head and rams the foe. It may also make the target flinch.

Mirror Shot.name: Mirror Shot
Mirror Shot.description: The user looses a flash of energy from its polished body. It may also lower the target’s accuracy.

Flash Cannon.name: Flash Cannon
Flash Cannon.description: The user gathers all its light energy and releases it at once. It may also lower the foe’s Sp. Def stat.

Rock Climb.name: Rock Climb
Rock Climb.description: A charging attack that may also leave the foe confused. It can also be used to scale rocky walls.

Defog.name: Defog
Defog.description: Obstacles are moved, reducing the foe’s evasion stat. It can also be used to clear deep fog, etc.

Trick Room.name: Trick Room
Trick Room.description: The user creates a bizarre area in which slower Pokémon get to move first for five turns.

Draco Meteor.name: Draco Meteor
Draco Meteor.description: Comets are summoned down from the sky. The attack’s recoil sharply reduces the user’s Sp. Atk stat.

Discharge.name: Discharge
Discharge.description: A flare of electricity is loosed to strike all Pokémon in battle. It may also cause paralysis.

Lava Plume.name: Lava Plume
Lava Plume.description: An inferno of scarlet flames washes over all Pokémon in battle. It may also inflict burns.

Leaf Storm.name: Leaf Storm
Leaf Storm.description: A storm of sharp leaves is whipped up. The attack’s recoil sharply reduces the user’s Sp. Atk stat.

Power Whip.name: Power Whip
Power Whip.description: The user violently whirls its vines or tentacles to harshly lash the foe.

Rock Wrecker.name: Rock Wrecker
Rock Wrecker.description: The user launches a huge boulder at the foe to attack. It must rest on the next turn, however.

Cross Poison.name: Cross Poison
Cross Poison.description: A slashing attack that may also leave the target poisoned. It has a high critical-hit ratio.

Gunk Shot.name: Gunk Shot
Gunk Shot.description: The user shoots filthy garbage at the foe to attack. It may also poison the target.

Iron Head.name: Iron Head
Iron Head.description: The foe slams the target with its steel-hard head. It may also make the target flinch.

Magnet Bomb.name: Magnet Bomb
Magnet Bomb.description: The user launches a steel bomb that sticks to the target. This attack will not miss.

Stone Edge.name: Stone Edge
Stone Edge.description: The user stabs the foe with a sharpened stone. It has a high critical-hit ratio.

Captivate.name: Captivate
Captivate.description: If it is the opposite gender of the user, the foe is charmed into sharply lowering its Sp. Atk stat.

Stealth Rock.name: Stealth Rock
Stealth Rock.description: The user lays a trap of levitating stones around the foe. The trap hurts foes that switch into battle.

Grass Knot.name: Grass Knot
Grass Knot.description: The user snares the foe with grass and trips it. The heavier the foe, the greater the damage.

Chatter.name: Chatter
Chatter.description: The user attacks using a sound wave based on words it has learned. It may also confuse the foe.

Judgment.name: Judgment
Judgment.description: The user releases countless shots of light. Its type varies with the kind of Plate the user is holding.

Bug Bite.name: Bug Bite
Bug Bite.description: The user bites the foe. If the foe is holding a Berry, the user eats it and gains its effect.

Charge Beam.name: Charge Beam
Charge Beam.description: The user fires a concentrated bundle of electricity. It may also raise the user’s Sp. Atk stat.

Wood Hammer.name: Wood Hammer
Wood Hammer.description: The user slams its rugged body into the foe to attack. The user also sustains serious damage.

Aqua Jet.name: Aqua Jet
Aqua Jet.description: The user lunges at the foe at a speed that makes it almost invisible. It is sure to strike first.

Attack Order.name: Attack Order
Attack Order.description: The user calls out its underlings to pummel the foe. It has a high critical-hit ratio.

Defend Order.name: Defend Order
Defend Order.description: The user calls out its underlings to make a living shield, raising its Defense and Sp. Def stats.

Heal Order.name: Heal Order
Heal Order.description: The user calls out its underlings to heal it. The user regains up to half of its max HP.

Head Smash.name: Head Smash
Head Smash.description: The user delivers a life-endangering head butt at full power. The user also takes terrible damage.

Double Hit.name: Double Hit
Double Hit.description: The user slams the foe with a tail, etc. The target is hit twice in a row.

Roar Of Time.name: Roar Of Time
Roar Of Time.description: The user blasts the foe with power that distorts even time. The user must rest on the next turn.

Spacial Rend.name: Spacial Rend
Spacial Rend.description: The user tears the foe along with the space around it. This move has a high critical-hit ratio.

Lunar Dance.name: Lunar Dance
Lunar Dance.description: The user faints. In return, the Pokémon taking its place will have its status and HP fully restored.

Crush Grip.name: Crush Grip
Crush Grip.description: The foe is crushed with great force. The attack is more powerful the more HP the foe has left.

Magma Storm.name: Magma Storm
Magma Storm.description: The foe becomes trapped within a maelstrom of fire that rages for two to five turns.

Dark Void.name: Dark Void
Dark Void.description: The foe is dragged into a world of total darkness that puts it to sleep.

Seed Flare.name: Seed Flare
Seed Flare.description: The user generates a shock wave from within its body. It may also lower the target’s Sp. Def.

Ominous Wind.name: Ominous Wind
Ominous Wind.description: The user creates a gust of repulsive wind. It may also raise all the user’s stats at once.

Shadow Force.name: Shadow Force
Shadow Force.description: The user disappears, then strikes the foe on the second turn. It hits even if the foe used Protect.

Hone Claws.name: Hone Claws
Hone Claws.description: The user sharpens its claws to boost its Attack stat and accuracy.

Wide Guard.name: Wide Guard
Wide Guard.description: The user and its allies are protected from wide-ranging attacks for one turn. If used in succession, its chance of failing rises.

Guard Split.name: Guard Split
Guard Split.description: The user employs its psychic power to average its Defense and Sp. Def stats with those of its target’s.

Power Split.name: Power Split
Power Split.description: The user employs its psychic power to average its Attack and Sp. Atk stats with those of the target’s.

Wonder Room.name: Wonder Room
Wonder Room.description: The user creates a bizarre area in which Pokémon’s Defense and Sp. Def stats are swapped for five turns.

Psyshock.name: Psyshock
Psyshock.description: The user materializes an odd psychic wave to attack the target. This attack does physical damage.

Venoshock.name: Venoshock
Venoshock.description: The user drenches the target in a special poisonous liquid. Its power is doubled if the target is poisoned.

Autotomize.name: Autotomize
Autotomize.description: The user sheds part of its body to make itself lighter and sharply raise its Speed stat.

Rage Powder.name: Rage Powder
Rage Powder.description: The user scatters a cloud of irritating powder to draw attention to itself. Opponents aim only at the user.

Telekinesis.name: Telekinesis
Telekinesis.description: The user makes the target float with its psychic power. The target is easier to hit for three turns.

Magic Room.name: Magic Room
Magic Room.description: The user creates a bizarre area in which Pokémon’s held items lose their effects for five turns.

Smack Down.name: Smack Down
Smack Down.description: The user throws a stone or projectile to attack an opponent. A flying Pokémon will fall to the ground when hit.

Storm Throw.name: Storm Throw
Storm Throw.description: The user strikes the target with a fierce blow. This attack always results in a critical hit.

Flame Burst.name: Flame Burst
Flame Burst.description: The user attacks the target with a bursting flame. The bursting flame damages Pokémon next to the target as well.

Sludge Wave.name: Sludge Wave
Sludge Wave.description: It swamps the area around the user with a giant sludge wave. It may also poison those hit.

Quiver Dance.name: Quiver Dance
Quiver Dance.description: The user lightly performs a beautiful, mystic dance. It boosts the user’s Sp. Atk, Sp. Def, and Speed stats.

Heavy Slam.name: Heavy Slam
Heavy Slam.description: The user slams into the target with its heavy body. The more the user outweighs the target, the greater its damage.

Synchronoise.name: Synchronoise
Synchronoise.description: Using an odd shock wave, the user inflicts damage on any Pokémon of the same type in the area around it.

Electro Ball.name: Electro Ball
Electro Ball.description: The user hurls an electric orb at the target. The faster the user is than the target, the greater the damage.

Soak.name: Soak
Soak.description: The user shoots a torrent of water at the target and changes the target’s type to Water.

Flame Charge.name: Flame Charge
Flame Charge.description: The user cloaks itself with flame and attacks. Building up more power, it raises the user’s Speed stat.

Coil.name: Coil
Coil.description: The user coils up and concentrates. This raises its Attack and Defense stats as well as its accuracy.

Low Sweep.name: Low Sweep
Low Sweep.description: The user attacks the target’s legs swiftly, reducing the target’s Speed stat.

Acid Spray.name: Acid Spray
Acid Spray.description: The user spits fluid that works to melt the target. This harshly reduces the target’s Sp. Def stat.

Foul Play.name: Foul Play
Foul Play.description: The user turns the target’s power against it. The higher the target’s Attack stat, the greater the damage.

Simple Beam.name: Simple Beam
Simple Beam.description: The user’s mysterious psychic wave changes the target’s Ability to Simple.

Entrainment.name: Entrainment
Entrainment.description: The user dances with an odd rhythm that compels the target to mimic it, making the target’s Ability the same as the user’s.

After You.name: After You
After You.description: The user helps the target and makes it use its move right after the user.

Round.name: Round
Round.description: The user attacks the target with a song. Others can join in the Round and make the attack do greater damage.

Echoed Voice.name: Echoed Voice
Echoed Voice.description: The user attacks the target with an echoing voice. If this move is used every turn, it does greater damage.

Chip Away.name: Chip Away
Chip Away.description: Looking for an opening, the user strikes continually. The target’s stat changes don’t affect this attack’s damage.

Clear Smog.name: Clear Smog
Clear Smog.description: The user attacks by throwing a clump of special mud. All status changes are returned to normal.

Stored Power.name: Stored Power
Stored Power.description: The user attacks the target with stored power. The more the user’s stats are raised, the greater the damage.

Quick Guard.name: Quick Guard
Quick Guard.description: The user protects itself and its allies from priority moves. If used in succession, its chance of failing rises.

Ally Switch.name: Ally Switch
Ally Switch.description: The user teleports using a strange power and switches its place with one of its allies.

Scald.name: Scald
Scald.description: The user shoots boiling hot water at its target. It may also leave the target with a burn.

Shell Smash.name: Shell Smash
Shell Smash.description: The user breaks its shell, lowering its Defense and Sp. Def stats but sharply raising Attack, Sp. Atk, and Speed stats.

Heal Pulse.name: Heal Pulse
Heal Pulse.description: The user emits a healing pulse which restores the target’s HP by up to half of its max HP.

Hex.name: Hex
Hex.description: This relentless attack does massive damage to a target affected by status problems.

Sky Drop.name: Sky Drop
Sky Drop.description: The user takes the target into the sky, then drops it during the next turn. The target cannot attack while in the sky.

Shift Gear.name: Shift Gear
Shift Gear.description: The user rotates its gears, raising its Attack and sharply raising its Speed.

Circle Throw.name: Circle Throw
Circle Throw.description: The user throws the target and drags out another Pokémon in its party. In the wild, the battle ends.

Incinerate.name: Incinerate
Incinerate.description: The user attacks the target with fire. If the target is holding a Berry, the Berry becomes burnt up and unusable.

Quash.name: Quash
Quash.description: The user suppresses the target and makes its move go last.

Acrobatics.name: Acrobatics
Acrobatics.description: The user nimbly strikes the target. If the user is not holding an item, this attack inflicts massive damage.

Reflect Type.name: Reflect Type
Reflect Type.description: The user reflects the target’s type, making it the same type as the target.

Retaliate.name: Retaliate
Retaliate.description: The user gets revenge for a fainted ally. If an ally fainted in the previous turn, this attack’s damage increases.

Final Gambit.name: Final Gambit
Final Gambit.description: The user risks everything to attack its target. The user faints but does damage equal to the user’s HP.

Bestow.name: Bestow
Bestow.description: The user passes its held item to the target when the target isn’t holding an item.

Inferno.name: Inferno
Inferno.description: The user attacks by engulfing the target in an intense fire. It leaves the target with a burn.

Water Pledge.name: Water Pledge
Water Pledge.description: A column of water strikes the target. When combined with its fire equivalent, the damage increases and a rainbow appears.

Fire Pledge.name: Fire Pledge
Fire Pledge.description: A column of fire hits opposing Pokémon. When used with its Grass equivalent, its damage increases into a vast sea of fire.

Grass Pledge.name: Grass Pledge
Grass Pledge.description: A column of grass hits opposing Pokémon. When used with its water equivalent, its damage increases into a vast swamp.

Volt Switch.name: Volt Switch
Volt Switch.description: After making its attack, the user rushes back to switch places with a party Pokémon in waiting.

Struggle Bug.name: Struggle Bug
Struggle Bug.description: While resisting, the user attacks the opposing Pokémon. The targets’ Sp. Atk stat is reduced.

Bulldoze.name: Bulldoze
Bulldoze.description: The user stomps down on the ground and attacks everything in the area. Hit Pokémon’s Speed stat is reduced.

Frost Breath.name: Frost Breath
Frost Breath.description: The user blows a cold breath on the target. This attack always results in a critical hit.

Dragon Tail.name: Dragon Tail
Dragon Tail.description: The user knocks away the target and drags out another Pokémon in its party. In the wild, the battle ends.

Work Up.name: Work Up
Work Up.description: The user is roused, and its Attack and Sp. Atk stats increase.

Electroweb.name: Electroweb
Electroweb.description: The user captures and attacks opposing Pokémon by using an electric net. It reduces the targets’ Speed stat.

Wild Charge.name: Wild Charge
Wild Charge.description: The user shrouds itself in electricity and smashes into its target. It also damages the user a little.

Drill Run.name: Drill Run
Drill Run.description: The user crashes into its target while rotating its body like a drill. Critical hits land more easily.

Dual Chop.name: Dual Chop
Dual Chop.description: The user attacks its target by hitting it with brutal strikes. The target is hit twice in a row.

Heart Stamp.name: Heart Stamp
Heart Stamp.description: The user unleashes a vicious blow after its cute act makes the target less wary. It may also make the target flinch.

Horn Leech.name: Horn Leech
Horn Leech.description: The user drains the target’s energy with its horns. The user’s HP is restored by half the damage taken by the target.

Sacred Sword.name: Sacred Sword
Sacred Sword.description: The user attacks by slicing with its long horns. The target’s stat changes don’t affect this attack’s damage.

Razor Shell.name: Razor Shell
Razor Shell.description: The user cuts its target with sharp shells. This attack may also lower the target’s Defense stat.

Heat Crash.name: Heat Crash
Heat Crash.description: The user slams its target with its flame- covered body. The more the user outweighs the target, the greater the damage.

Leaf Tornado.name: Leaf Tornado
Leaf Tornado.description: The user attacks its target by encircling it in sharp leaves. This attack may also lower the target’s accuracy.

Steamroller.name: Steamroller
Steamroller.description: The user crushes its targets by rolling over them with its rolled-up body. This attack may make the target flinch.

Cotton Guard.name: Cotton Guard
Cotton Guard.description: The user protects itself by wrapping its body in soft cotton, drastically raising the user’s Defense stat.

Night Daze.name: Night Daze
Night Daze.description: The user lets loose a pitch-black shock wave at its target. It may also lower the target’s accuracy.

Psystrike.name: Psystrike
Psystrike.description: The user materializes an odd psychic wave to attack the target. This attack does physical damage.

Tail Slap.name: Tail Slap
Tail Slap.description: The user attacks by striking the target with its hard tail. It hits the target two to five times in a row.

Hurricane.name: Hurricane
Hurricane.description: The user attacks by wrapping its opponent in a fierce wind that flies up into the sky. It may also confuse the target.

Head Charge.name: Head Charge
Head Charge.description: The user charges its head into its target, using its powerful guard hair. It also damages the user a little.

Gear Grind.name: Gear Grind
Gear Grind.description: The user attacks by throwing two steel gears at its target.

Searing Shot.name: Searing Shot
Searing Shot.description: An inferno of scarlet flames torches everything around the user. It may leave targets with a burn.

Techno Blast.name: Techno Blast
Techno Blast.description: The user fires a beam of light at its target. The type changes depending on the Drive the user holds.

Relic Song.name: Relic Song
Relic Song.description: The user sings an ancient song and attacks by appealing to the hearts of those listening. It may also induce sleep.

Secret Sword.name: Secret Sword
Secret Sword.description: The user cuts with its long horn. The odd power contained in the horn does physical damage to the target.

Glaciate.name: Glaciate
Glaciate.description: The user attacks by blowing freezing cold air at opposing Pokémon. This attack reduces the targets’ Speed stat.

Bolt Strike.name: Bolt Strike
Bolt Strike.description: The user charges its target, surrounding itself with a great amount of electricity. It may leave the target with paralysis.

Blue Flare.name: Blue Flare
Blue Flare.description: The user attacks by engulfing the target in an intense, yet beautiful, blue flame. It may leave the target with a burn.

Fiery Dance.name: Fiery Dance
Fiery Dance.description: Cloaked in flames, the user dances and flaps its wings. It may also raise the user’s Sp. Atk stat.

Freeze Shock.name: Freeze Shock
Freeze Shock.description: On the second turn, the user hits the target with electrically charged ice. It may leave the target with paralysis.

Ice Burn.name: Ice Burn
Ice Burn.description: On the second turn, an ultracold, freezing wind surrounds the target. This may leave the target with a burn.

Snarl.name: Snarl
Snarl.description: The user yells as if it is ranting about something, making the target’s Sp. Atk stat decrease.

Icicle Crash.name: Icicle Crash
Icicle Crash.description: The user attacks by harshly dropping an icicle onto the target. It may also make the target flinch.

V Create.name: V Create
V Create.description: With a hot flame on its forehead, the user hurls itself at its target. It lowers the user’s Defense, Sp. Def, and Speed stats.

Fusion Flare.name: Fusion Flare
Fusion Flare.description: The user brings down a giant flame. This attack does greater damage when influenced by an enormous thunderbolt.

Fusion Bolt.name: Fusion Bolt
Fusion Bolt.description: The user throws down a giant thunderbolt. This attack does greater damage when influenced by an enormous flame.

Flying Press.name: Flying Press
Flying Press.description: The user dives down onto the target from the sky. This move is Fighting and Flying type simultaneously.

Mat Block.name: Mat Block
Mat Block.description: Using a pulled-up mat as a shield, the user protects itself and its allies from damaging moves. This does not stop status moves.

Belch.name: Belch
Belch.description: The user lets out a damaging belch at the target. The user must eat a held Berry to use this move.

Rototiller.name: Rototiller
Rototiller.description: Tilling the soil, the user makes it easier for plants to grow. This raises the Attack and Sp. Atk stats of Grass-type Pokémon.

Sticky Web.name: Sticky Web
Sticky Web.description: The user weaves a sticky net around the opposing team, which lowers their Speed stat upon switching into battle.

Fell Stinger.name: Fell Stinger
Fell Stinger.description: When the user knocks out a target with this move, the user’s Attack stat rises sharply.

Phantom Force.name: Phantom Force
Phantom Force.description: The user vanishes somewhere, then strikes the target on the next turn. This move hits even if the target protects itself.

Trick Or Treat.name: Trick Or Treat
Trick Or Treat.description: The user takes the target trick-or-treating. This adds Ghost type to the target’s type.

Noble Roar.name: Noble Roar
Noble Roar.description: Letting out a noble roar, the user intimidates the target and lowers its Attack and Sp. Atk stats.

Ion Deluge.name: Ion Deluge
Ion Deluge.description: The user disperses electrically charged particles, which changes Normal-type moves to Electric-type moves.

Parabolic Charge.name: Parabolic Charge
Parabolic Charge.description: The user attacks everything around it. The user’s HP is restored by half the damage taken by those hit.

Forests Curse.name: Forests Curse
Forests Curse.description: The user puts a forest curse on the target. Afflicted targets are now Grass type as well.

Petal Blizzard.name: Petal Blizzard
Petal Blizzard.description: The user stirs up a violent petal blizzard and attacks everything around it.

Freeze Dry.name: Freeze Dry
Freeze Dry.description: The user rapidly cools the target. This may also leave the target frozen. This move is super effective on Water types.

Disarming Voice.name: Disarming Voice
Disarming Voice.description: Letting out a charming cry, the user does emotional damage to opposing Pokémon. This attack never misses.

Parting Shot.name: Parting Shot
Parting Shot.description: With a parting threat, the user lowers the target’s Attack and Sp. Atk stats. Then it switches with a party Pokémon.

Topsy Turvy.name: Topsy Turvy
Topsy Turvy.description: All stat changes affecting the target turn topsy-turvy and become the opposite of what they were.

Draining Kiss.name: Draining Kiss
Draining Kiss.description: The user steals the target’s energy with a kiss. The user’s HP is restored by over half of the damage taken by the target.

Crafty Shield.name: Crafty Shield
Crafty Shield.description: The user protects itself and its allies from status moves with a mysterious power. This does not stop moves that do damage.

Flower Shield.name: Flower Shield
Flower Shield.description: The user raises the Defense stat of all Grass-type Pokémon in battle with a mysterious power.

Grassy Terrain.name: Grassy Terrain
Grassy Terrain.description: The user turns the ground under everyone’s feet to grass for five turns. This restores the HP of Pokémon on the ground a little every turn.

Misty Terrain.name: Misty Terrain
Misty Terrain.description: The user covers the ground under everyone’s feet with mist for five turns. This protects Pokémon on the ground from status conditions.

Electrify.name: Electrify
Electrify.description: If the target is electrified before it uses a move during that turn, the target’s move becomes Electric type.

Play Rough.name: Play Rough
Play Rough.description: The user plays rough with the target and attacks it. This may also lower the target’s Attack stat.

Fairy Wind.name: Fairy Wind
Fairy Wind.description: The user stirs up a fairy wind and strikes the target with it.

Moonblast.name: Moonblast
Moonblast.description: Borrowing the power of the moon, the user attacks the target. This may also lower the target’s Sp. Atk stat.

Boomburst.name: Boomburst
Boomburst.description: The user attacks everything around it with the destructive power of a terrible, explosive sound.

Fairy Lock.name: Fairy Lock
Fairy Lock.description: By locking down the battlefield, the user keeps all Pokémon from fleeing during the next turn.

Kings Shield.name: Kings Shield
Kings Shield.description: The user takes a defensive stance while it protects itself from damage. It also harshly lowers the Attack stat of any attacker who makes direct contact.

Play Nice.name: Play Nice
Play Nice.description: The user and the target become friends, and the target loses its will to fight. This lowers the target’s Attack stat.

Confide.name: Confide
Confide.description: The user tells the target a secret, and the target loses its ability to concentrate. This lowers the target’s Sp. Atk stat.

Diamond Storm.name: Diamond Storm
Diamond Storm.description: The user whips up a storm of diamonds to damage opposing Pokémon. This may also raise the user’s Defense stat.

Steam Eruption.name: Steam Eruption
Steam Eruption.description: The user immerses the target in superheated steam. This may also leave the target with a burn.

Hyperspace Hole.name: Hyperspace Hole
Hyperspace Hole.description: Using a hyperspace hole, the user appears right next to the target and strikes. This also hits a target using Protect or Detect.

Water Shuriken.name: Water Shuriken
Water Shuriken.description: The user hits the target with throwing stars two to five times in a row. This move always goes first.

Mystical Fire.name: Mystical Fire
Mystical Fire.description: The user attacks by breathing a special, hot fire. This also lowers the target’s Sp. Atk stat.

Spiky Shield.name: Spiky Shield
Spiky Shield.description: In addition to protecting the user from attacks, this move also damages any attacker who makes direct contact.

Aromatic Mist.name: Aromatic Mist
Aromatic Mist.description: The user raises the Sp. Def stat of an ally Pokémon by using a mysterious aroma.

Eerie Impulse.name: Eerie Impulse
Eerie Impulse.description: The user’s body generates an eerie impulse. Exposing the target to it harshly lowers the target’s Sp. Atk stat.

Venom Drench.name: Venom Drench
Venom Drench.description: Opposing Pokémon are drenched in an odd poisonous liquid. This lowers the Attack, Sp. Atk, and Speed stats of a poisoned target.

Powder.name: Powder
Powder.description: The user covers the target in a powder that explodes and damages the target if it uses a Fire-type move.

Geomancy.name: Geomancy
Geomancy.description: The user absorbs energy and sharply raises its Sp. Atk, Sp. Def, and Speed stats on the next turn.

Magnetic Flux.name: Magnetic Flux
Magnetic Flux.description: The user manipulates magnetic fields, which raises the Defense and Sp. Def stats of ally Pokémon with the Plus or Minus Ability.

Happy Hour.name: Happy Hour
Happy Hour.description: Using Happy Hour doubles the amount of prize money received after battle.

Electric Terrain.name: Electric Terrain
Electric Terrain.description: The user electrifies the ground under everyone’s feet for five turns. Pokémon on the ground no longer fall asleep.

Dazzling Gleam.name: Dazzling Gleam
Dazzling Gleam.description: The user damages opposing Pokémon by emitting a powerful flash.

Celebrate.name: Celebrate
Celebrate.description: The Pokémon congratulates you on your special day!

Hold Hands.name: Hold Hands
Hold Hands.description: The user and an ally hold hands. This makes them very happy.

Baby Doll Eyes.name: Baby Doll Eyes
Baby Doll Eyes.description: The user stares at the target with its baby-doll eyes, which lowers its Attack stat. This move always goes first.

Nuzzle.name: Nuzzle
Nuzzle.description: The user attacks by nuzzling its electrified cheeks against the target. This also leaves the target with paralysis.

Hold Back.name: Hold Back
Hold Back.description: The user holds back when it attacks and the target is left with at least 1 HP.

Infestation.name: Infestation
Infestation.description: The target is infested and attacked for four to five turns. The target can’t flee during this time.

Power Up Punch.name: Power Up Punch
Power Up Punch.description: Striking opponents over and over makes the user’s fists harder. Hitting a target raises the Attack stat.

Oblivion Wing.name: Oblivion Wing
Oblivion Wing.description: The user absorbs its target’s HP. The user’s HP is restored by over half of the damage taken by the target.

Thousand Arrows.name: Thousand Arrows
Thousand Arrows.description: This move also hits opposing Pokémon that are in the air. Those Pokémon are knocked down to the ground.

Thousand Waves.name: Thousand Waves
Thousand Waves.description: The user attacks with a wave that crawls along the ground. Those hit can’t flee from battle.

Lands Wrath.name: Lands Wrath
Lands Wrath.description: The user gathers the energy of the land and focuses that power on opposing Pokémon to damage them.

Light Of Ruin.name: Light Of Ruin
Light Of Ruin.description: Drawing power from the Eternal Flower, the user fires a powerful beam of light. This also damages the user quite a lot.

Origin Pulse.name: Origin Pulse
Origin Pulse.description: The user attacks opposing Pokémon with countless beams of light that glow a deep and brilliant blue.

Precipice Blades.name: Precipice Blades
Precipice Blades.description: The user attacks opposing Pokémon by manifesting the power of the land in fearsome blades of stone.

Dragon Ascent.name: Dragon Ascent
Dragon Ascent.description: After soaring upward, the user attacks its target by dropping out of the sky at high speeds, although it lowers its own Defense and Sp. Def in the process.

Hyperspace Fury.name: Hyperspace Fury
Hyperspace Fury.description: Using its many arms, the user unleashes a barrage of attacks that ignore the effects of moves like Protect and Detect. This attack lowers the user’s Defense.

Breakneck Blitz Physical.name: Breakneck Blitz  Physical
Breakneck Blitz Physical.description: The user builds up its momentum using its Z-Power and crashes into the target at full speed. The power varies, depending on the original move.

All Out Pummeling Physical.name: All Out Pummeling  Physical
All Out Pummeling Physical.description: The user rams an energy orb created by its Z-Power into the target with full force. The power varies, depending on the original move.

Supersonic Skystrike Physical.name: Supersonic Skystrike  Physical
Supersonic Skystrike Physical.description: The user soars up with its Z-Power and plummets toward the target at full speed. The power varies, depending on the original move.

Acid Downpour Physical.name: Acid Downpour  Physical
Acid Downpour Physical.description: The user creates a poisonous swamp using its Z-Power and sinks the target into it at full force. The power varies, depending on the original move.

Tectonic Rage Physical.name: Tectonic Rage  Physical
Tectonic Rage Physical.description: The user burrows deep into the ground and slams into the target with the full force of its Z-Power. The power varies, depending on the original move.

Continental Crush Physical.name: Continental Crush  Physical
Continental Crush Physical.description: The user summons a huge rock mountain using its Z-Power and drops it onto the target with full force. The power varies, depending on the original move.

Savage Spin Out Physical.name: Savage Spin Out  Physical
Savage Spin Out Physical.description: The user binds the target with full force with threads of silk that the user spits using its Z-Power. The power varies, depending on the original move.

Never Ending Nightmare Physical.name: Never Ending Nightmare  Physical
Never Ending Nightmare Physical.description: Deep-seated grudges summoned by the user’s Z-Power trap the target. The power varies, depending on the original move.

Corkscrew Crash Physical.name: Corkscrew Crash  Physical
Corkscrew Crash Physical.description: The user spins very fast and rams into the target with the full force of its Z-Power. The power varies, depending on the original move.

Inferno Overdrive Physical.name: Inferno Overdrive  Physical
Inferno Overdrive Physical.description: The user breathes a stream of intense fire toward the target with the full force of its Z-Power. The power varies depending on the original move.

Hydro Vortex Physical.name: Hydro Vortex  Physical
Hydro Vortex Physical.description: The user creates a huge whirling current using its Z-Power to swallow the target with full force. The power varies, depending on the original move.

Bloom Doom Physical.name: Bloom Doom  Physical
Bloom Doom Physical.description: The user collects energy from plants using its Z-Power and attacks the target with full force. The power varies, depending on the original move.

Gigavolt Havoc Physical.name: Gigavolt Havoc  Physical
Gigavolt Havoc Physical.description: The user hits the target with a powerful electric current collected by its Z-Power. The power varies, depending on the original move.

Shattered Psyche Physical.name: Shattered Psyche  Physical
Shattered Psyche Physical.description: The user controls the target with its Z-Power and hurts the target with full force. The power varies, depending on the original move.

Subzero Slammer Physical.name: Subzero Slammer  Physical
Subzero Slammer Physical.description: The user dramatically drops the temperature using its Z-Power and freezes the target with full force. The power varies, depending on the original move.

Devastating Drake Physical.name: Devastating Drake  Physical
Devastating Drake Physical.description: The user materializes its aura using its Z-Power and attacks the target with full force. The power varies, depending on the original move.

Black Hole Eclipse Physical.name: Black Hole Eclipse  Physical
Black Hole Eclipse Physical.description: The user gathers dark energy using its Z-Power and sucks the target into it. The power varies, depending on the original move.

Twinkle Tackle Physical.name: Twinkle Tackle  Physical
Twinkle Tackle Physical.description: The user creates a very charming space using its Z-Power and totally toys with the target. The power varies, depending on the original move.

Catastropika.name: Catastropika
Catastropika.description: The user, Pikachu, surrounds itself with the maximum amount of electricity using its Z-Power and pounces on its target with full force.

Shore Up.name: Shore Up
Shore Up.description: The user regains up to half of its max HP. It restores more HP in a sandstorm.

First Impression.name: First Impression
First Impression.description: Although this move has great power, it only works the first turn the user is in battle.

Baneful Bunker.name: Baneful Bunker
Baneful Bunker.description: In addition to protecting the user from attacks, this move also poisons any attacker that makes direct contact.

Spirit Shackle.name: Spirit Shackle
Spirit Shackle.description: The user attacks while simultaneously stitching the target’s shadow to the ground to prevent the target from escaping.

Darkest Lariat.name: Darkest Lariat
Darkest Lariat.description: The user swings both arms and hits the target. The target’s stat changes don’t affect this attack’s damage.

Sparkling Aria.name: Sparkling Aria
Sparkling Aria.description: The user bursts into song, emitting many bubbles. Any Pokémon suffering from a burn will be healed by the touch of these bubbles.

Ice Hammer.name: Ice Hammer
Ice Hammer.description: The user swings and hits with its strong, heavy fist. It lowers the user’s Speed, however.

Floral Healing.name: Floral Healing
Floral Healing.description: The user restores the target’s HP by up to half of its max HP. It restores more HP when the terrain is grass.

High Horsepower.name: High Horsepower
High Horsepower.description: The user fiercely attacks the target using its entire body.

Strength Sap.name: Strength Sap
Strength Sap.description: The user restores its HP by the same amount as the target’s Attack stat. It also lowers the target’s Attack stat.

Solar Blade.name: Solar Blade
Solar Blade.description: In this two-turn attack, the user gathers light and fills a blade with the light’s energy, attacking the target on the next turn.

Leafage.name: Leafage
Leafage.description: The user attacks by pelting the target with leaves.

Spotlight.name: Spotlight
Spotlight.description: The user shines a spotlight on the target so that only the target will be attacked during the turn.

Toxic Thread.name: Toxic Thread
Toxic Thread.description: The user shoots poisonous threads to poison the target and lower the target’s Speed stat.

Laser Focus.name: Laser Focus
Laser Focus.description: The user concentrates intensely. The attack on the next turn always results in a critical hit.

Gear Up.name: Gear Up
Gear Up.description: The user engages its gears to raise the Attack and Sp. Atk stats of ally Pokémon with the Plus or Minus Ability.

Throat Chop.name: Throat Chop
Throat Chop.description: The user attacks the target’s throat, and the resultant suffering prevents the target from using moves that emit sound for two turns.

Pollen Puff.name: Pollen Puff
Pollen Puff.description: The user attacks the enemy with a pollen puff that explodes. If the target is an ally, it gives the ally a pollen puff that restores its HP instead.

Anchor Shot.name: Anchor Shot
Anchor Shot.description: The user entangles the target with its anchor chain while attacking. The target becomes unable to flee.

Psychic Terrain.name: Psychic Terrain
Psychic Terrain.description: This protects Pokémon on the ground from priority moves and powers up Psychic-type moves for five turns.

Lunge.name: Lunge
Lunge.description: The user makes a lunge at the target, attacking with full force. This also lowers the target’s Attack stat.

Fire Lash.name: Fire Lash
Fire Lash.description: The user strikes the target with a burning lash. This also lowers the target’s Defense stat.

Power Trip.name: Power Trip
Power Trip.description: The user boasts its strength and attacks the target. The more the user’s stats are raised, the greater the move’s power.

Burn Up.name: Burn Up
Burn Up.description: To inflict massive damage, the user burns itself out. After using this move, the user will no longer be Fire type.

Speed Swap.name: Speed Swap
Speed Swap.description: The user exchanges Speed stats with the target.

Smart Strike.name: Smart Strike
Smart Strike.description: The user stabs the target with a sharp horn. This attack never misses.

Purify.name: Purify
Purify.description: The user heals the target’s status condition. If the move succeeds, it also restores the user’s own HP.

Revelation Dance.name: Revelation Dance
Revelation Dance.description: The user attacks the target by dancing very hard. The user’s type determines the type of this move.

Core Enforcer.name: Core Enforcer
Core Enforcer.description: If the Pokémon the user has inflicted damage on have already used their moves, this move eliminates the effect of the target’s Ability.

Trop Kick.name: Trop Kick
Trop Kick.description: The user lands an intense kick of tropical origins on the target. This also lowers the target’s Attack stat.

Instruct.name: Instruct
Instruct.description: The user instructs the target to use the target’s last move again.

Beak Blast.name: Beak Blast
Beak Blast.description: The user first heats up its beak, and then it attacks the target. Making direct contact with the Pokémon while it’s heating up its beak results in a burn.

Clanging Scales.name: Clanging Scales
Clanging Scales.description: The user rubs the scales on its entire body and makes a huge noise to attack the opposing Pokémon. The user’s Defense stat goes down after the attack.

Dragon Hammer.name: Dragon Hammer
Dragon Hammer.description: The user uses its body like a hammer to attack the target and inflict damage.

Brutal Swing.name: Brutal Swing
Brutal Swing.description: The user swings its body around violently to inflict damage on everything in its vicinity.

Aurora Veil.name: Aurora Veil
Aurora Veil.description: This move reduces damage from physical and special moves for five turns. This can be used only in a hailstorm.

Sinister Arrow Raid.name: Sinister Arrow Raid
Sinister Arrow Raid.description: The user, Decidueye, creates countless arrows using its Z-Power and shoots the target with full force.

Malicious Moonsault.name: Malicious Moonsault
Malicious Moonsault.description: The user, Incineroar, strengthens its body using its Z-Power and crashes into the target with full force.

Oceanic Operetta.name: Oceanic Operetta
Oceanic Operetta.description: The user, Primarina, summons a massive amount of  water using its Z-Power and attacks the target with  full force.

Guardian Of Alola.name: Guardian Of Alola
Guardian Of Alola.description: The user, the Land Spirit Pokémon, obtains Alola’s energy using its Z-Power and attacks the target with full force. This reduces the target’s HP greatly.

Soul Stealing 7 Star Strike.name: Soul Stealing 7 Star Strike
Soul Stealing 7 Star Strike.description: After obtaining Z-Power, the user, Marshadow, punches and kicks the target consecutively with full force.

Stoked Sparksurfer.name: Stoked Sparksurfer
Stoked Sparksurfer.description: After obtaining Z-Power, the user, Alolan Raichu, attacks the target with full force. This move leaves the target with paralysis.

Pulverizing Pancake.name: Pulverizing Pancake
Pulverizing Pancake.description: Z-Power brings out the true capabilities of the user, Snorlax. The Pokémon moves its enormous body energetically and attacks the target with full force.

Extreme Evoboost.name: Extreme Evoboost
Extreme Evoboost.description: After obtaining Z-Power, the user, Eevee, gets energy from its evolved friends and boosts its stats sharply.

Genesis Supernova.name: Genesis Supernova
Genesis Supernova.description: After obtaining Z-Power, the user, Mew, attacks the target with full force. The terrain will be charged with psychic energy.

Shell Trap.name: Shell Trap
Shell Trap.description: The user sets a shell trap. If the user is hit by a physical move, the trap will explode and inflict damage on the opposing Pokémon.

Fleur Cannon.name: Fleur Cannon
Fleur Cannon.description: The user unleashes a strong beam. The attack’s recoil harshly lowers the user’s Sp. Atk stat.

Psychic Fangs.name: Psychic Fangs
Psychic Fangs.description: The user bites the target with its psychic capabilities. This can also destroy Light Screen and Reflect.

Stomping Tantrum.name: Stomping Tantrum
Stomping Tantrum.description: Driven by frustration, the user attacks the target. If the user’s previous move has failed, the power of this move doubles.

Shadow Bone.name: Shadow Bone
Shadow Bone.description: The user attacks by beating the target with a bone that contains a spirit. This may also lower the target’s Defense stat.

Accelerock.name: Accelerock
Accelerock.description: The user smashes into the target at high speed. This move always goes first.

Liquidation.name: Liquidation
Liquidation.description: The user slams into the target using a full-force blast of water. This may also lower the target’s Defense stat.

Prismatic Laser.name: Prismatic Laser
Prismatic Laser.description: The user shoots powerful lasers using the power of a prism. The user can’t move on the next turn.

Spectral Thief.name: Spectral Thief
Spectral Thief.description: The user hides in the target’s shadow, steals the target’s stat boosts, and then attacks.

Sunsteel Strike.name: Sunsteel Strike
Sunsteel Strike.description: The user slams into the target with the force of a meteor. This move can be used on the target  regardless of its Abilities.

Moongeist Beam.name: Moongeist Beam
Moongeist Beam.description: The user emits a sinister ray to attack the target. This move can be used on the target regardless of  its Abilities.

Tearful Look.name: Tearful Look
Tearful Look.description: The user gets teary eyed to make the target lose its combative spirit. This lowers the target’s Attack and Sp. Atk stats.

Zing Zap.name: Zing Zap
Zing Zap.description: A strong electric blast crashes down on the target, giving it an electric shock. This may also make the target flinch.

Natures Madness.name: Natures Madness
Natures Madness.description: The user hits the target with the force of nature. It halves the target’s HP.

Multi Attack.name: Multi Attack
Multi Attack.description: Cloaking itself in high energy, the user slams into the target. The memory held determines the move’s type.

10 000 000 Volt Thunderbolt.name: 10 000 000 Volt Thunderbolt
10 000 000 Volt Thunderbolt.description: The user, Pikachu wearing a cap, powers up a jolt of electricity using its Z-Power and unleashes it. Critical hits land more easily.

Mind Blown.name: Mind Blown
Mind Blown.description: The user attacks everything around it by causing its own head to explode. This also damages the user.

Plasma Fists.name: Plasma Fists
Plasma Fists.description: The user attacks with electrically charged fists. This move changes Normal-type moves to Electric-type moves.

Photon Geyser.name: Photon Geyser
Photon Geyser.description: The user attacks a target with a pillar of light. This move inflicts Attack or Sp. Atk damage—whichever stat is higher for the user.

Light That Burns The Sky.name: Light That Burns The Sky
Light That Burns The Sky.description: This attack inflicts Attack or Sp. Atk damage— whichever stat is higher for the user, Necrozma.  This move ignores the target’s Ability.

Searing Sunraze Smash.name: Searing Sunraze Smash
Searing Sunraze Smash.description: After obtaining Z-Power, the user, Solgaleo, attacks the target with full force. This move can ignore the effect of the target’s Ability.

Menacing Moonraze Maelstrom.name: Menacing Moonraze Maelstrom
Menacing Moonraze Maelstrom.description: After obtaining Z-Power, the user, Lunala, attacks the target with full force. This move can ignore the effect of the target’s Ability.

Lets Snuggle Forever.name: Lets Snuggle Forever
Lets Snuggle Forever.description: After obtaining Z-Power, the user, Mimikyu, punches the target with full force.

Splintered Stormshards.name: Splintered Stormshards
Splintered Stormshards.description: After obtaining Z-Power, the user, Lycanroc, attacks the target with full force. This move negates the effect on the battlefield.

Clangorous Soulblaze.name: Clangorous Soulblaze
Clangorous Soulblaze.description: After obtaining Z-Power, the user, Kommo-o, attacks the opposing Pokémon with full force. This move boosts the user’s stats.

Zippy Zap.name: Zippy Zap
Zippy Zap.description: The user attacks the target with bursts of electricity at high speed. This move always goes first and results in a critical hit.

Splishy Splash.name: Splishy Splash
Splishy Splash.description: The user charges a huge wave with electricity and hits the opposing Pokémon with the wave. This may also leave the opposing Pokémon with paralysis.

Floaty Fall.name: Floaty Fall
Floaty Fall.description: The user floats in the air, and then dives at a steep angle to attack the target. This may also make the target flinch.

Pika Papow.name: Pika Papow
Pika Papow.description: The more Pikachu loves its Trainer, the greater the move’s power. It never misses.

Bouncy Bubble.name: Bouncy Bubble
Bouncy Bubble.description: The user attacks by shooting water bubbles at the target. It then absorbs water and restores its HP by half the damage taken by the target.

Buzzy Buzz.name: Buzzy Buzz
Buzzy Buzz.description: The user shoots a jolt of electricity to attack the target. This also leaves the target with paralysis.

Sizzly Slide.name: Sizzly Slide
Sizzly Slide.description: The user cloaks itself in fire and charges at the target. This also leaves the target with a burn.

Glitzy Glow.name: Glitzy Glow
Glitzy Glow.description: The user bombards the target with telekinetic force. A wondrous wall of light is put up to weaken the power of the opposing Pokémon’s special moves.

Baddy Bad.name: Baddy Bad
Baddy Bad.description: The user acts bad and attacks the target. A wondrous wall of light is put up to weaken the power of the opposing Pokémon’s physical moves.

Sappy Seed.name: Sappy Seed
Sappy Seed.description: The user grows a gigantic stalk that scatters seeds to attack the target. The seeds drain the target’s HP every turn.

Freezy Frost.name: Freezy Frost
Freezy Frost.description: The user attacks with a crystal made of cold frozen haze. It eliminates every stat change among all the Pokémon engaged in battle.

Sparkly Swirl.name: Sparkly Swirl
Sparkly Swirl.description: The user attacks the target by wrapping it with a whirlwind of an overpowering scent. This also heals all status conditions of the user’s party.

Veevee Volley.name: Veevee Volley
Veevee Volley.description: The more Eevee loves its Trainer, the greater the move’s power. It never misses.

Double Iron Bash.name: Double Iron Bash
Double Iron Bash.description: The user rotates, centering the hex nut in its chest, and then strikes with its arms twice in a row. This may also make the target flinch.

Max Guard.name: Max Guard
Max Guard.description: This move enables the user to protect itself from all attacks. Its chance of failing rises if it is used in succession.

Dynamax Cannon.name: Dynamax Cannon
Dynamax Cannon.description: The user unleashes a strong beam from its core. This move deals twice the damage if the target is Dynamaxed.

Snipe Shot.name: Snipe Shot
Snipe Shot.description: The user ignores the effects of opposing Pokémon’s moves and Abilities that draw in moves, allowing this move to hit the chosen target.

Jaw Lock.name: Jaw Lock
Jaw Lock.description: This move prevents the user and the target from switching out until either of them faints. The effect goes away if either of the Pokémon leaves the field.

Stuff Cheeks.name: Stuff Cheeks
Stuff Cheeks.description: The user eats its held Berry, then sharply raises its Defense stat.

No Retreat.name: No Retreat
No Retreat.description: This move raises all the user’s stats but prevents the user from switching out or fleeing.

Tar Shot.name: Tar Shot
Tar Shot.description: The user pours sticky tar over the target, lowering the target’s Speed stat. The target becomes weaker to Fire-type moves.

Magic Powder.name: Magic Powder
Magic Powder.description: The user scatters a cloud of magic powder that changes the target to Psychic type.

Dragon Darts.name: Dragon Darts
Dragon Darts.description: The user attacks twice using Dreepy. If there are two targets, this move hits each target once.

Teatime.name: Teatime
Teatime.description: The user has teatime with all the Pokémon in the battle. Each Pokémon eats its held Berry.

Octolock.name: Octolock
Octolock.description: The user locks the target in and prevents it from fleeing. This move also lowers the target’s Defense and Sp. Def every turn.

Bolt Beak.name: Bolt Beak
Bolt Beak.description: The user stabs the target with its electrified beak. If the user attacks before the target, the power of this move is doubled.

Fishious Rend.name: Fishious Rend
Fishious Rend.description: The user rends the target with its hard gills. If the user attacks before the target, the power of this move is doubled.

Court Change.name: Court Change
Court Change.description: With its mysterious power, the user swaps the effects on either side of the field.

Max Flare.name: Max Flare
Max Flare.description: This is a Fire-type attack Dynamax Pokémon use. The user intensifies the sun for five turns.

Max Flutterby.name: Max Flutterby
Max Flutterby.description: This is a Bug-type attack Dynamax Pokémon use. This lowers the target’s Sp. Atk stat.

Max Lightning.name: Max Lightning
Max Lightning.description: This is an Electric-type attack Dynamax Pokémon use. The user turns the ground into Electric Terrain for five turns.

Max Strike.name: Max Strike
Max Strike.description: This is a Normal-type attack Dynamax Pokémon use. This lowers the target’s Speed stat.

Max Knuckle.name: Max Knuckle
Max Knuckle.description: This is a Fighting-type attack Dynamax Pokémon use. This raises ally Pokémon’s Attack stats.

Max Phantasm.name: Max Phantasm
Max Phantasm.description: This is a Ghost-type attack Dynamax Pokémon use. This lowers the target’s Defense stat.

Max Hailstorm.name: Max Hailstorm
Max Hailstorm.description: This is an Ice-type attack Dynamax Pokémon use. The user summons a hailstorm lasting five turns.

Max Ooze.name: Max Ooze
Max Ooze.description: This is a Poison-type attack Dynamax Pokémon use. This raises ally Pokémon’s Sp. Atk stats.

Max Geyser.name: Max Geyser
Max Geyser.description: This is a Water-type attack Dynamax Pokémon use. The user summons a heavy rain that falls for five turns.

Max Airstream.name: Max Airstream
Max Airstream.description: This is a Flying-type attack Dynamax Pokémon use. This raises ally Pokémon’s Speed stats.

Max Starfall.name: Max Starfall
Max Starfall.description: This is a Fairy-type attack Dynamax Pokémon use. The user turns the ground into Misty Terrain for five turns.

Max Wyrmwind.name: Max Wyrmwind
Max Wyrmwind.description: This is a Dragon-type attack Dynamax Pokémon use. This lowers the target’s Attack stat.

Max Mindstorm.name: Max Mindstorm
Max Mindstorm.description: This is a Psychic-type attack Dynamax Pokémon use. The user turns the ground into Psychic Terrain for five turns.

Max Rockfall.name: Max Rockfall
Max Rockfall.description: This is a Rock-type attack Dynamax Pokémon use. The user summons a sandstorm lasting five turns.

Max Quake.name: Max Quake
Max Quake.description: This is a Ground-type attack Dynamax Pokémon use. This raises ally Pokémon’s Sp. Def stats.

Max Darkness.name: Max Darkness
Max Darkness.description: This is a Dark-type attack Dynamax Pokémon use. This lowers the target’s Sp. Def stat.

Max Overgrowth.name: Max Overgrowth
Max Overgrowth.description: This is a Grass-type attack Dynamax Pokémon use. The user turns the ground into Grassy Terrain for five turns.

Max Steelspike.name: Max Steelspike
Max Steelspike.description: This is a Steel-type attack Dynamax Pokémon use. This raises ally Pokémon’s Defense stats.

Clangorous Soul.name: Clangorous Soul
Clangorous Soul.description: The user raises all its stats by using some of its HP.

Body Press.name: Body Press
Body Press.description: The user attacks by slamming its body into the target. The higher the user’s Defense, the more damage it can inflict on the target.

Decorate.name: Decorate
Decorate.description: The user sharply raises the target’s Attack and Sp. Atk stats by decorating the target.

Drum Beating.name: Drum Beating
Drum Beating.description: The user plays its drum, controlling the drum’s roots to attack the target. This also lowers the target’s Speed stat.

Snap Trap.name: Snap Trap
Snap Trap.description: The user snares the target in a snap trap for four to five turns.

Pyro Ball.name: Pyro Ball
Pyro Ball.description: The user attacks by igniting a small stone and launching it as a fiery ball at the target. This may also leave the target with a burn.

Behemoth Blade.name: Behemoth Blade
Behemoth Blade.description: The user becomes a gigantic sword and cuts the target. This move deals twice the damage if the target is Dynamaxed.

Behemoth Bash.name: Behemoth Bash
Behemoth Bash.description: The user becomes a gigantic shield and slams into the target. This move deals twice the damage if the target is Dynamaxed.

Aura Wheel.name: Aura Wheel
Aura Wheel.description: Morpeko attacks and raises its Speed with the energy stored in its cheeks. This move’s type changes depending on the user’s form.

Breaking Swipe.name: Breaking Swipe
Breaking Swipe.description: The user swings its tough tail wildly and attacks opposing Pokémon. This also lowers their Attack stats.

Branch Poke.name: Branch Poke
Branch Poke.description: The user attacks the target by poking it with a sharply pointed branch.

Overdrive.name: Overdrive
Overdrive.description: The user attacks opposing Pokémon by twanging a guitar or bass guitar, causing a huge echo and strong vibration.

Apple Acid.name: Apple Acid
Apple Acid.description: The user attacks the target with an acidic liquid created from tart apples. This also lowers the target’s Sp. Def stat.

Grav Apple.name: Grav Apple
Grav Apple.description: The user inflicts damage by dropping an apple from high above. This also lowers the target’s Defense stat.

Spirit Break.name: Spirit Break
Spirit Break.description: The user attacks the target with so much force that it could break the target’s spirit. This also lowers the target’s Sp. Atk stat.

Strange Steam.name: Strange Steam
Strange Steam.description: The user attacks the target by emitting steam. This may also confuse the target.

Life Dew.name: Life Dew
Life Dew.description: The user scatters mysterious water around and restores the HP of itself and its ally Pokémon in the battle.

Obstruct.name: Obstruct
Obstruct.description: This move enables the user to protect itself from all attacks. Its chance of failing rises if it is used in succession. Direct contact harshly lowers the attacker’s Defense stat.

False Surrender.name: False Surrender
False Surrender.description: The user pretends to bow its head, but then it stabs the target with its disheveled hair. This attack never misses.

Meteor Assault.name: Meteor Assault
Meteor Assault.description: The user attacks wildly with its thick leek. The user can’t move on the next turn, because the force of this move makes it stagger.

Eternabeam.name: Eternabeam
Eternabeam.description: This is Eternatus’s most powerful attack in its original form. The user can’t move on the next turn.

Steel Beam.name: Steel Beam
Steel Beam.description: The user fires a beam of steel that it collected from its entire body. This also damages the user.

Expanding Force.name: Expanding Force
Expanding Force.description: The user attacks the target with its psychic power. This move’s power goes up and damages all opposing Pokémon on Psychic Terrain.

Steel Roller.name: Steel Roller
Steel Roller.description: The user attacks while destroying the terrain. This move fails when the ground hasn’t turned into a terrain.

Scale Shot.name: Scale Shot
Scale Shot.description: The user attacks by shooting scales two to five times in a row. This move boosts the user’s Speed stat but lowers its Defense stat.

Meteor Beam.name: Meteor Beam
Meteor Beam.description: In this two-turn attack, the user gathers space power and boosts its Sp. Atk stat, then attacks the target on the next turn.

Shell Side Arm.name: Shell Side Arm
Shell Side Arm.description: This move inflicts physical or special damage, whichever will be more effective. This may also poison the target.

Misty Explosion.name: Misty Explosion
Misty Explosion.description: The user attacks everything around it and faints upon using this move. This move’s power is increased on Misty Terrain.

Grassy Glide.name: Grassy Glide
Grassy Glide.description: Gliding on the ground, the user attacks the target. This move always goes first on Grassy Terrain.

Rising Voltage.name: Rising Voltage
Rising Voltage.description: The user attacks with electric voltage rising from the ground. This move’s power doubles when the target is on Electric Terrain.

Terrain Pulse.name: Terrain Pulse
Terrain Pulse.description: The user utilizes the power of the terrain to attack. This move’s type and power changes depending on the terrain when it’s used.

Skitter Smack.name: Skitter Smack
Skitter Smack.description: The user skitters behind the target to attack. This also lowers the target’s Sp. Atk stat.

Burning Jealousy.name: Burning Jealousy
Burning Jealousy.description: The user attacks with energy from jealousy. This leaves all opposing Pokémon that have had their stats boosted during the turn with a burn.

Lash Out.name: Lash Out
Lash Out.description: The user lashes out to vent its frustration toward the target. If the user’s stats were lowered during this turn, the power of this move is doubled.

Poltergeist.name: Poltergeist
Poltergeist.description: The user attacks the target by controlling the target’s item. The move fails if the target doesn’t have an item.

Corrosive Gas.name: Corrosive Gas
Corrosive Gas.description: The user surrounds everything around it with highly acidic gas and melts away items they hold.

Coaching.name: Coaching
Coaching.description: The user properly coaches its ally Pokémon, boosting their Attack and Defense stats.

Flip Turn.name: Flip Turn
Flip Turn.description: After making its attack, the user rushes back to switch places with a party Pokémon in waiting.

Triple Axel.name: Triple Axel
Triple Axel.description: A consecutive three-kick attack that becomes more powerful with each successful hit.

Dual Wingbeat.name: Dual Wingbeat
Dual Wingbeat.description: The user slams the target with its wings. The target is hit twice in a row.

Scorching Sands.name: Scorching Sands
Scorching Sands.description: The user throws scorching sand at the target to attack. This may also leave the target with a burn.

Jungle Healing.name: Jungle Healing
Jungle Healing.description: The user becomes one with the jungle, restoring HP and healing any status conditions of itself and its ally Pokémon in battle.

Wicked Blow.name: Wicked Blow
Wicked Blow.description: The user, having mastered the Dark style, strikes the target with a fierce blow. This attack always results in a critical hit.

Surging Strikes.name: Surging Strikes
Surging Strikes.description: The user, having mastered the Water style, strikes the target with a flowing motion three times in a row. This attack always results in a critical hit.

Thunder Cage.name: Thunder Cage
Thunder Cage.description: The user traps the target in a cage of sparking electricity for four to five turns.

Dragon Energy.name: Dragon Energy
Dragon Energy.description: Converting its life-force into power, the user attacks opposing Pokémon. The lower the user’s HP, the lower the move’s power.

Freezing Glare.name: Freezing Glare
Freezing Glare.description: The user shoots its psychic power from its eyes to attack. This may also leave the target frozen.

Fiery Wrath.name: Fiery Wrath
Fiery Wrath.description: The user transforms its wrath into a fire-like aura to attack. This may also make opposing Pokémon flinch.

Thunderous Kick.name: Thunderous Kick
Thunderous Kick.description: The user overwhelms the target with lightning-like movement before delivering a kick. This also lowers the target’s Defense stat.

Glacial Lance.name: Glacial Lance
Glacial Lance.description: The user attacks by hurling a blizzard-cloaked icicle lance at opposing Pokémon.

Astral Barrage.name: Astral Barrage
Astral Barrage.description: The user attacks by sending a frightful amount of small ghosts at opposing Pokémon.

Eerie Spell.name: Eerie Spell
Eerie Spell.description: The user attacks with its tremendous psychic power. This also removes 3 PP from the target’s last move.

Dire Claw.name: Dire Claw
Dire Claw.description: The user lashes out at the target with ruinous claws, aiming to land a critical hit. This may also leave the target poisoned, paralyzed, or drowsy.

Psyshield Bash.name: Psyshield Bash
Psyshield Bash.description: Cloaking itself in psychic energy, the user slams into the target. This may also raise the user’s defensive stats.

Power Shift.name: Power Shift
Power Shift.description: The user swaps its offensive and defensive stats.

Stone Axe.name: Stone Axe
Stone Axe.description: The user swings its stone axes at the target, aiming to land a critical hit. Stone splinters left behind by this attack continue to damage the target for several turns.

Springtide Storm.name: Springtide Storm
Springtide Storm.description: The user attacks by wrapping the target in fierce winds brimming with love and hate. This move’s additional effects depend on the user’s form.

Mystical Power.name: Mystical Power
Mystical Power.description: The user strengthens itself with a mysterious power. If it excels in offense, its offensive stats are raised. If it excels in defense, its defensive stats are raised.

Raging Fury.name: Raging Fury
Raging Fury.description: The user rampages and spews vicious flames to inflict damage on the target, then becomes fixated on using this move.

Wave Crash.name: Wave Crash
Wave Crash.description: The user shrouds itself in water and slams into the target with its whole body to inflict damage. This also damages the user and raises the user’s action speed.

Chloroblast.name: Chloroblast
Chloroblast.description: The user launches its amassed chlorophyll to inflict damage on the target. This also damages the user and lowers the user's action speed.

Mountain Gale.name: Mountain Gale
Mountain Gale.description: The user hurls giant chunks of ice at the target to inflict damage.

Victory Dance.name: Victory Dance
Victory Dance.description: The user performs a dance to usher in victory. This raises the user’s offensive and defensive stats and increases the damage dealt by the user’s moves by 50 percent.

Headlong Rush.name: Headlong Rush
Headlong Rush.description: The user smashes into the target in a full-body tackle. This also lowers the user’s defensive stats.

Barb Barrage.name: Barb Barrage
Barb Barrage.description: The user launches countless toxic barbs to inflict damage. This may also poison the target. This move’s power is doubled if the target has a status condition.

Esper Wing.name: Esper Wing
Esper Wing.description: The user slashes the target with aura-enriched wings. This also raises the user's action speed. This move has a heightened chance of landing a critical hit.

Bitter Malice.name: Bitter Malice
Bitter Malice.description: The user attacks its target with spine-chilling resentment. This may also leave the target with frostbite. This move's power is doubled if the target has a status condition.

Shelter.name: Shelter
Shelter.description: The user makes its skin as hard as an iron shield, raising its defensive stats. Incoming moves also become more likely to miss.

Triple Arrows.name: Triple Arrows
Triple Arrows.description: The user delivers an axe kick, then fires three arrows. This raises the chance of its future attacks landing critical hits and also lowers the target's defensive stats.

Infernal Parade.name: Infernal Parade
Infernal Parade.description: The user attacks with myriad fireballs. This may also leave the target with a burn. This move's power is doubled if the target has a status condition.

Ceaseless Edge.name: Ceaseless Edge
Ceaseless Edge.description: The user slashes its shell blade at the target, aiming to land a critical hit. Shell splinters left behind by this attack will continue to damage the target for several turns.

Bleakwind Storm.name: Bleakwind Storm
Bleakwind Storm.description: The user attacks with savagely cold winds that cause both body and spirit to tremble. This may also leave the target with frostbite.

Wildbolt Storm.name: Wildbolt Storm
Wildbolt Storm.description: The user summons a thunderous tempest and savagely attacks with lightning and wind. This may also leave the target with paralysis.

Sandsear Storm.name: Sandsear Storm
Sandsear Storm.description: The user attacks by wrapping the target in fierce winds and searingly hot sand. This also leaves the target with a burn.

Lunar Blessing.name: Lunar Blessing
Lunar Blessing.description: The user heals its own status conditions and restores its HP. Incoming moves also become more likely to miss.

Take Heart.name: Take Heart
Take Heart.description: The user lifts its spirits, healing its own status conditions and raising its offensive and defensive stats.

Tera Blast.name: Tera Blast
Tera Blast.description: If the user has Terastallized, it unleashes energy of its Tera Type. This move inflicts damage using the Attack or Sp. Atk stat—whichever is higher for the user.

Silk Trap.name: Silk Trap
Silk Trap.description: The user spins a silken trap, protecting itself from damage while lowering the Speed stat of any attacker that makes direct contact.

Axe Kick.name: Axe Kick
Axe Kick.description: The user attacks by kicking up into the air and slamming its heel down upon the target. This may also confuse the target. If it misses, the user takes damage instead.

Last Respects.name: Last Respects
Last Respects.description: The user attacks to avenge its allies. The more defeated allies there are in the user's party, the greater the move's power.

Lumina Crash.name: Lumina Crash
Lumina Crash.description: The user attacks by unleashing a peculiar light that even affects the mind. This also harshly lowers the target's Sp. Def stat.

Order Up.name: Order Up
Order Up.description: The user attacks with elegant poise. If the user has a Tatsugiri in its mouth, this move boosts one of the user's stats based on the Tatsugiri's form.

Jet Punch.name: Jet Punch
Jet Punch.description: The user summons a torrent around its fist and punches at blinding speed. This move always goes first.

Spicy Extract.name: Spicy Extract
Spicy Extract.description: The user emits an incredibly spicy extract, sharply boosting the target's Attack stat and harshly lowering the target's Defense stat.

Spin Out.name: Spin Out
Spin Out.description: The user spins furiously by straining its legs, inflicting damage on the target. This also harshly lowers the user's Speed stat.

Population Bomb.name: Population Bomb
Population Bomb.description: The user’s fellows gather in droves to perform a combo attack that hits the target one to ten times in a row.

Ice Spinner.name: Ice Spinner
Ice Spinner.description: The user covers its feet in thin ice and twirls around, slamming into the target. This move's spinning motion also destroys the terrain.

Glaive Rush.name: Glaive Rush
Glaive Rush.description: The user throws its entire body into a reckless charge. After this move is used, attacks on the user cannot miss and will inflict double damage until the user’s next turn.

Revival Blessing.name: Revival Blessing
Revival Blessing.description: The user bestows a loving blessing, reviving a party Pokémon that has fainted and restoring half that Pokémon's max HP.

Salt Cure.name: Salt Cure
Salt Cure.description: The user salt cures the target, inflicting damage every turn. Steel and Water types are more strongly affected by this move.

Triple Dive.name: Triple Dive
Triple Dive.description: The user performs a perfectly timed triple dive, hitting the target with splashes of water three times in a row.

Mortal Spin.name: Mortal Spin
Mortal Spin.description: The user performs a spin attack that can also eliminate the effects of such moves as Bind, Wrap, and Leech Seed. This also poisons opposing Pokémon.

Doodle.name: Doodle
Doodle.description: The user captures the very essence of the target in a sketch. This changes the Abilities of the user and its ally Pokémon to that of the target.

Fillet Away.name: Fillet Away
Fillet Away.description: The user sharply boosts its Attack, Sp. Atk, and Speed stats by using its own HP.

Kowtow Cleave.name: Kowtow Cleave
Kowtow Cleave.description: The user slashes at the target after kowtowing to make the target let down its guard. This attack never misses.

Flower Trick.name: Flower Trick
Flower Trick.description: The user throws a rigged bouquet of flowers at the target. This attack never misses and always lands a critical hit.

Torch Song.name: Torch Song
Torch Song.description: The user blows out raging flames as if singing a song, scorching the target. This also boosts the user's Sp. Atk stat.

Aqua Step.name: Aqua Step
Aqua Step.description: The user toys with the target and attacks it using light and fluid dance steps. This also boosts the user's Speed stat.

Raging Bull.name: Raging Bull
Raging Bull.description: The user performs a tackle like a raging bull. This move's type depends on the user's form. It can also break barriers, such as Light Screen and Reflect.

Make It Rain.name: Make It Rain
Make It Rain.description: The user attacks by throwing out a mass of coins. This also lowers the user's Sp. Atk stat. Money is earned after the battle.

Psyblade.name: Psyblade
Psyblade.description: The user rends the target with an ethereal blade. This move's power is boosted by 50 percent if the user is on Electric Terrain.

Hydro Steam.name: Hydro Steam
Hydro Steam.description: The user blasts the target with boiling-hot water. This move's power is not lowered in harsh sunlight but rather boosted by 50 percent.

Ruination.name: Ruination
Ruination.description: The user summons a ruinous disaster. This cuts the target’s HP in half.

Collision Course.name: Collision Course
Collision Course.description: The user transforms and crashes to the ground, causing a massive prehistoric explosion. This move's power is boosted more than usual if it’s a supereffective hit.

Electro Drift.name: Electro Drift
Electro Drift.description: The user races forward at ultrafast speeds, piercing its target with futuristic electricity. This move's power is boosted more than usual if it's a supereffective hit.

Shed Tail.name: Shed Tail
Shed Tail.description: The user creates a substitute for itself using its own HP before switching places with a party Pokémon in waiting.

Chilly Reception.name: Chilly Reception
Chilly Reception.description: The user tells a chillingly bad joke before switching places with a party Pokémon in waiting. This summons a snowstorm lasting five turns.

Tidy Up.name: Tidy Up
Tidy Up.description: The user tidies up and removes the effects of Spikes, Stealth Rock, Sticky Web, Toxic Spikes, and Substitute. This also boosts the user’s Attack and Speed stats.

Snowscape.name: Snowscape
Snowscape.description: The user summons a snowstorm lasting five turns. This boosts the Defense stats of Ice types.

Pounce.name: Pounce
